creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
Thank you a lot for the commit. I hadn't noticed that
"libhdf5.so:science/hdf5" needed to be added as LIB_DEPENDS, thank you
for fixing.

I created a new bugzilla account to solve the issue regarding my usage
of different mail addresses, it's not the first time it's an issue but
I was not sure yet if I needed to do something and what/how. It should
not create trouble anymore I hope.
